overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime drive through a rain-soaked neon-lit city. The player follows a yellow car through urban streets, stops at an intersection, navigates a tunnel system, and emerges into a hotel district with prominent neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with elevated highway

events.description: approaching and stopping behind yellow car at red traffic light
accelerating from stop as traffic light changes

agents.ego_description: driving through rain-soaked neon city streets, stopping at intersection behind yellow vehicle

notable_agents.action: yellow car ahead braking and stopping at traffic light

entered.detail: large red neon V-shaped signage on building facade
illuminated billboard displaying a face advertisement
elevated highway overpass with support columns
tall modern buildings with reflective glass and neon accents

segments.scene_description: Driving through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city street at night, surrounded by towering glass buildings and vibrant neon signage. The vehicle approaches an intersection and stops behind a yellow car waiting at a red light, with rain droplets visible on the windshield and wet asphalt reflecting the neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection approach with tunnel entrance

events.description: making left turn at intersection following yellow car
approaching concrete tunnel entrance with road barriers

agents.ego_description: accelerating from intersection and navigating toward tunnel entrance following the yellow car

notable_agents.action: yellow car turning left and proceeding toward tunnel

entered.detail: yellow and white striped concrete barriers lining the road
large concrete archway marking tunnel entrance
orange traffic barrels with reflective stripes

segments.scene_description: Accelerating through the intersection and making a left turn, leaving the dense neon district behind. The vehicle approaches a tunnel entrance marked by concrete barriers and construction barrels, with the yellow car maintaining its lead position ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete underpass tunnel with directional signage

events.description: entering covered tunnel structure with concrete walls
district notification 'COASTVIEW' appears on HUD while driving through tunnel

agents.ego_description: navigating through winding tunnel following the yellow car at moderate speed

notable_agents.action: yellow car maintaining speed through tunnel curves

entered.detail: smooth concrete walls with vertical paneling and exhaust vents
overhead fluorescent lights illuminating the tunnel interior
rectangular ventilation grates on tunnel walls

segments.scene_description: Driving through the enclosed tunnel system with artificial lighting replacing the neon glow of the city. The concrete walls create a narrow, sheltered environment as the vehicle follows the yellow car through gentle curves, with the HUD displaying a district notification for 'COASTVIEW'.

scene_state.functional_zone: hotel district with large neon signage and commercial buildings

events.description: exiting tunnel back into open city streets with visible neon signage
passing large blue neon hotel sign on left side of road

agents.ego_description: exiting tunnel and continuing through hotel district following the yellow car through intersections

notable_agents.action: yellow car navigating through hotel district intersections

entered.detail: large blue neon sign spelling 'HOTEL' on building facade
multiple illuminated advertising screens on building walls
red neon signage indicating the Pacifica district

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tunnel back into the rain-soaked urban environment, the scene opens into a hotel district dominated by large neon signage. The vehicle passes a prominent blue 'HOTEL' sign and continues through the commercial area, with the yellow car still leading the way through the wet streets.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a rain-soaked neon metropolis that gradually transitions into a starker, industrial tunnel approach. It begins amidst towering glass buildings and vibrant signage, where the camera lingers behind a yellow car stopped at a red light while rain droplets streak the windshield. As the light changes, the vehicle accelerates through the intersection and makes a left turn, causing the dense glow of the neon district to recede. The scene then shifts toward a more utilitarian environment, moving past concrete barriers and construction barrels as the camera follows the yellow car toward the mouth of a tunnel.

The shot follows a continuous drive that transitions from the sterile confinement of an underground tunnel into the vibrant, rain-soaked glow of a neon hotel district. It begins within a narrow concrete tunnel system where artificial lighting replaces the city's colors as the vehicle follows a yellow car through gentle curves. As the camera moves forward, the enclosed walls give way to the open air, and the HUD signals an entry into the Coastview district. The scene then expands into a wet urban environment dominated by towering commercial signage, passing a prominent blue hotel sign while continuing to trail the yellow car through the shimmering, rain-slicked streets.
